betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Geiger Counter§f detects radiation in your environment.

§eTask:§f Craft 1x §bGeiger Counter§f

§eFunction:§f
• Displays ambient radiation levels
• Warns of dangerous exposure
• Essential safety equipment for nuclear work

§eUsage:§f
• Hold in hand to see radiation readings
• Check for radioactive leaks
• Monitor areas around nuclear equipment
• Detect contaminated zones

§c§4IMPORTANT:§f Always carry when working with nuclear materials!

§aTip:§f Your first line of defense against invisible radiation hazards.
